message:
fix(mail): prefer GT_TOWN_ROOT env var for town root detection

workspace.Find stops at the first mayor/town.json when !inWorktree,
so running from a rig directory that has its own mayor/town.json
misidentifies the rig as the town root, breaking mail routing to
hq- prefixed beads.

Prefer GT_TOWN_ROOT/GT_ROOT env vars (always set by session manager)
with workspace detection as fallback for CI and fresh installs.

Fixes gt-0lwl6.

Co-Authored-By: DreadPirateRobertz <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
